element.ToolTip: Specify port number 0-65535, which are allowed. Multiple values can be specified by separating them with a ';'.
element.Name: edtUDP

element.ToolTip: Specify port number 0-65535, which are allowed. Multiple values can be specified by separating them with a ';'.
element.Name: edtTCP

element.ToolTip: Specify integral values in the range 0-255, which represent the ICMP message types that are allowed. Multiple values can be specified by separating them with a ';'.
element.Name: edtICMP

element.ToolTip: Specify integral values in the range 0-255, which represent IP protocol types that are allowed. Multiple values can be specified by separating them with a ';'.
element.Name: edtIP

element.ToolTip: Specify hexadecimal values upto 0xFFFF, that represent MAC types that are allowed. Multiple values can be specified by separating them with a ';'.
element.Name: edtMAC

element.ToolTip: Select to allow ISIS packets to pass.
element.Name: chkISIS

element.ToolTip: Select to allow all packets to pass.
element.Name: chkEnableAll
rbReset
element.Text: Reset existing filter setting before applying
